query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consignados WHERE TRIM(supervisor) = 'Luana') as consig_luana,
  (SELECT SUM(CAST(rbm AS DECIMAL(15,2))) FROM consignados WHERE TRIM(supervisor) = 'Luana') as rbm_consig_luana,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT supervisor) FROM consignados WHERE supervisor IS NOT NULL AND supervisor != '') as supervisores_distintos,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TRIM(supervisor) ORDER BY supervisor SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM consignados WHERE supervisor IS NOT NULL AND supervisor != '' LIMIT 10) as lista_supervisores;

  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT supervisor) FROM consignados WHERE supervisor IS NOT NULL AND supervisor != '') as supervisores_distintos,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TRIM(supervisor) ORDER BY supervisor SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM consignados WHERE supervisor IS NOT NULL AND supervisor != '' LIMIT 10) as lista_supervisores;
